seo.title: Who is AI for? | AInspiration
seo.description: Discover how AI can transform your business, regardless of its size or sector.

hero.title: Who is AI for?
hero.introBold: As a preferred partner for freelancers, micro-businesses and SMEs
hero.introText: , we tailor all our services to meet the specific needs and challenges of smaller structures.
hero.introSub: Every solution presented on this site is designed and optimised to support your development, whether you are a sole trader or the director of an SME, with flexible and accessible offers that adjust to your entrepreneurial reality.

sizes.sectionTitle: A solution tailored to every business size

freelance.title: Freelancers & Sole Traders
freelance.description: Multiply your productivity and offer higher value-added services without increasing your workload. AI lets you focus on your expertise whilst automating time-consuming tasks.

tpe.title: Micro-businesses (fewer than 10 employees)
tpe.description: Compete effectively with larger structures by optimising your processes and increasing your responsiveness. AI gives you access to tools previously reserved for large enterprises.

pme.title: SMEs (up to 250 employees)
pme.description: Profoundly transform your organisation to gain in efficiency and profitability. AI allows you to unlock your teams' potential and optimise all your processes.

adaptation.sectionTitle: How we adapt our services to your reality

scalable.title: Solutions scaled to your size
scalable.description: We do not impose oversized and costly solutions. Our offerings are modular and adapt precisely to the size of your structure.
benefits: Start with a targeted, high-impact scope
Progressive evolution based on your results

riskFree.title: Risk-free business model
riskFree.description: Our approach is designed to minimise the financial risks of small structures, with progressive investments and a quick ROI.
benefits: Free audit and personalised action plan

commerce.title: Retail
commerce.description: Stock optimisation, personalisation of product recommendations, sales forecasting and improvement of the customer experience via 24/7 chatbot.

services.title: Services
services.description: Automation of administrative tasks, generation of personalised quotes, intelligent appointment management and predictive demand analysis.

craft.title: Crafts
craft.description: Optimised supply management, AI-assisted design creation, accurate estimation of deadlines and costs, digital promotion of expertise.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Predictive maintenance, automated quality control, optimisation of production lines and waste reduction through real-time analysis.

liberal.title: Liberal professions
liberal.description: Intelligent document analysis, automated note-taking, assisted legal or medical research, and drafting of reports and summaries.

keyBenefits.sectionTitle: Key AI benefits for your business

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Affordable and easy-to-implement AI solutions, regardless of the size of your structure.

timeSaving.title: Time saving
timeSaving.description: Automation of repetitive tasks to focus on what truly matters for your business.

roi.title: Fast ROI
roi.description: A measurable return on investment from the first months of using our solutions.

adaptability.title: Adaptability
adaptability.description: Bespoke solutions that evolve with your needs and adapt to your growth.

testimonials.sectionTitle: They have transformed their business with our solutions

thomas.quote: As an independent consultant, AI allowed me to offer analytical services that only large firms previously provided. My turnover increased by 40% in the first year.
thomas.name: Thomas D.

marie.quote: With 8 employees, our online shop faced giants. AI allowed us to offer a personalised experience to our clients and optimise our stock. We reduced costs by 30% whilst increasing sales.
marie.name: Marie L.

cta.title: Ready to transform your business with AI?
cta.description: As a preferred partner for freelancers, micro-businesses and SMEs, we offer you a free audit to identify optimisation opportunities specific to your activity.
